choices.text: Sampling-based (RRT/RRT*) via MoveIt 2 + OMPL. Grid A* infeasible in high-dim C-space. RRT* probabilistically complete + asymptotically optimal. Trajectory optimization (CHOMP/TrajOpt) for smoothness.

questions.explanation: RRT* / OMPL for high-dim arm planning.

choices.text: Nav2 (ROS 2): global planner (NavFn/SmacPlanner A*) + local planner (DWB/MPPI) + costmaps (static map + dynamic obstacles) + recovery behaviors. Industry standard for mobile robots.
